cards.label: Total requests
cards.explanation: Number of synthetic requests in the local validation fixture.
cards.claim_safety_note: Display as local fixture data only.

cards.label: Baseline model calls
cards.explanation: Model-call events counted for the direct baseline path.
cards.claim_safety_note: Do not convert this value into billing or production evidence.

cards.label: KORA model calls
cards.explanation: Model-call events counted for the KORA-controlled path.

cards.label: Avoided model calls
cards.explanation: Baseline model calls minus KORA model calls in the fixture.
cards.claim_safety_note: Do not convert this value into billing or production evidence.

cards.label: Avoided model-call rate
cards.explanation: Avoided model calls divided by baseline model calls in the fixture.
cards.claim_safety_note: Do not convert this ratio into billing, provider, or energy claims.

cards.label: Deterministic routes
cards.explanation: Requests handled through deterministic or fast local paths.
cards.claim_safety_note: Applies only to the synthetic fixture.

cards.label: Model escalations
cards.explanation: Requests escalated to the selected model-call path.
cards.claim_safety_note: Display as local fixture routing behavior.

cards.label: Validation passes
cards.explanation: Validation checks that passed in the fixture.

cards.label: Validation failures
cards.explanation: Validation checks that failed in the fixture.
cards.claim_safety_note: Applies only to sample fixture data.

cards.label: Errors
cards.explanation: Runtime or validation errors counted in the fixture.

cards.label: Fallbacks
cards.explanation: Requests that fell back because a route was unsupported or unresolved.
cards.claim_safety_note: Display as synthetic fixture behavior only.
